tasks.label: fanpage-signed-webhook-smoke
tasks.command:
set -e && cd '/d/CodeAiTanPhat/TPE_OpenClaw' && npm --prefix skills/fanpage_webhook install >/tmp/fanpage-npm-install.log 2>&1 && LOG='/tmp/fanpage-webhook-test.log' && : > "$LOG" && FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN='test_token' FACEBOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN='verify_123' FB_APP_SECRET='app_secret_123' OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN='dummy' PORT='3012' node.exe skills/fanpage_webhook/server.js >"$LOG" 2>&1 & PID=$! && sleep 2 && payload='{"object":"page","entry":[]}' && sig=$(node.exe -e "const c=require('crypto');const p=process.argv[1];const s=process.argv[2];process.stdout.write(c.createHmac('sha256',s).update(p).digest('hex'));" "$payload" 'app_secret_123') && ok_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_ok_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "x-hub-signature-256: sha256=$sig" --data "$payload") && bad_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_bad_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'x-hub-signature-256: sha256=deadbeef' --data "$payload") && verify_ok_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_verify_ok_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook?hub.mode=subscribe&hub.verify_token=verify_123&hub.challenge=12345') && verify_bad_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_verify_bad_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook?hub.mode=subscribe&hub.verify_token=wrong_token&hub.challenge=12345') && health_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_health_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/healthz') && ok_body=$(cat /tmp/fanpage_ok_body.txt) && verify_ok_body=$(cat /tmp/fanpage_verify_ok_body.txt) && health_body=$(cat /tmp/fanpage_health_body.txt) && kill "$PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && wait "$PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && printf 'OK_POST_CODE=%s
' "$ok_code" && printf 'BAD_SIG_CODE=%s
' "$bad_code" && printf 'VERIFY_OK_CODE=%s
' "$verify_ok_code" && printf 'VERIFY_BAD_CODE=%s
' "$verify_bad_code" && printf 'HEALTH_CODE=%s
' "$health_code" && printf 'OK_POST_BODY=%s
' "$ok_body" && printf 'VERIFY_OK_BODY=%s
' "$verify_ok_body" && printf 'HEALTH_BODY=%s
' "$health_body" && printf '--- SERVER_LOG_TAIL ---
' && tail -n 20 "$LOG"

tasks.label: write-fanpage-smoke-script
tasks.command:
cat > /tmp/fanpage_signed_smoke.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd '/d/CodeAiTanPhat/TPE_OpenClaw'

npm --prefix skills/fanpage_webhook install >/tmp/fanpage-npm-install.log 2>&1

LOG='/tmp/fanpage-webhook-test.log'
: > "$LOG"

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${PID:-}" ]]; then
    kill "$PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "$PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN='test_token' \
FACEBOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN='verify_123' \
FB_APP_SECRET='app_secret_123' \
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN='dummy' \
PORT='3012' \
node.exe skills/fanpage_webhook/server.js >"$LOG" 2>&1 &
PID=$!
sleep 2

payload='{"object":"page","entry":[]}'
sig=$(node.exe -e "const c=require('crypto');const p=process.argv[1];const s=process.argv[2];process.stdout.write(c.createHmac('sha256',s).update(p).digest('hex'));" "$payload" 'app_secret_123')

ok_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_ok_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "x-hub-signature-256: sha256=$sig" --data "$payload")
bad_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_bad_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'x-hub-signature-256: sha256=deadbeef' --data "$payload")
verify_ok_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_verify_ok_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook?hub.mode=subscribe&hub.verify_token=verify_123&hub.challenge=12345')
verify_bad_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_verify_bad_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/webhook?hub.mode=subscribe&hub.verify_token=wrong_token&hub.challenge=12345')
health_code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/fanpage_health_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" 'http://127.0.0.1:3012/healthz')

ok_body=$(cat /tmp/fanpage_ok_body.txt)
verify_ok_body=$(cat /tmp/fanpage_verify_ok_body.txt)
health_body=$(cat /tmp/fanpage_health_body.txt)

printf 'OK_POST_CODE=%s\n' "$ok_code"
printf 'BAD_SIG_CODE=%s\n' "$bad_code"
printf 'VERIFY_OK_CODE=%s\n' "$verify_ok_code"
printf 'VERIFY_BAD_CODE=%s\n' "$verify_bad_code"
printf 'HEALTH_CODE=%s\n' "$health_code"
printf 'OK_POST_BODY=%s\n' "$ok_body"
printf 'VERIFY_OK_BODY=%s\n' "$verify_ok_body"
printf 'HEALTH_BODY=%s\n' "$health_body"
printf '%s\n' '--- SERVER_LOG_TAIL ---'
tail -n 20 "$LOG"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fanpage_signed_smoke.sh
